name: Suzhou Hycan Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Suzhou Hycan Holdings Co., Ltd. provides metal and plastic packaging solutions in China and internationally. The company offers food grade metal cover, cans round can, tank square can, and can products; chemical tank round can and steel bucket; chemical tank square barrel; chemical tank square tank and can; chemical tank; steel bucket; cap; round can; and square can products. It also provides blow molded packaging and container; injection packaging straight can and spiral barrel; injection molding drum and oval barrel; and injection molding plastic box products. The company was formerly known as Suzhou Huayuan Packaging Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Suzhou Hycan Holdings Co., Ltd. in January 2017. Suzhou Hycan Holdings Co., Ltd. is based in Suzhou, China.
